calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Sep-21-2011 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204. Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Anasse.

Petitioner: Maria Montoya was present in propria persona and was assisted in English/Spanish translation by Francisca Oropeza, Social Worker.

Respondent: Manuel Martinez was present in propria persona.

Parties were sworn prior to the commencement of the hearing.

Matter called. Ms. Oropeza was sworn to translate the proceedings as set forth above.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, DENIED the Petitioner's request.
